mapper.insert: insert into orderdetail(orderbasetable_id,goodstable_id,shoppingnum) select #{id},goodstable_id,shoppingnum from carttable where busertable_id=#{user.id}
mapper.update: update goodstable g inner join (select goodstable_id,shoppingnum from carttable where busertable_id=#{user.id}) ct set g.gstore=g.gstore-ct.shoppingnum where g.id=ct.goodstable_id
mapper.select: select g.id,g.gpicture,g.gname,g.grprice,o.shoppingnum from orderdetail o,goodstable g where o.goodstable_id=g.id and orderbasetable_id=#{orderId}
